examples.title: TLS 1.3 Handshake
examples.code:
1. Client → Server: ClientHello (supported_versions, cipher_suites)
2. Server → Client: ServerHello (selected_version, cipher_suite)
3. Server → Client: EncryptedExtensions, Certificate, CertificateVerify
4. Both: Derive traffic secrets using HKDF
5. Client → Server: Finished
examples.explanation: Zero-RTT data possible after initial handshake
